# Awesome AI Repos

> 3,400+ AI and agent repos, auto-distilled from what's actually being shared on X — ranked, classified, and worth your stars.

[![repos](https://img.shields.io/badge/repos-3479-blue)](https://gh-ai.leap-forward.ca/) ![stars tracked](https://img.shields.io/badge/stars%20tracked-23%2C247%2C358-yellow) ![domains](https://img.shields.io/badge/domains-19-green) [![live site](https://img.shields.io/badge/live%20site-explore-ff4088)](https://gh-ai.leap-forward.ca/)

The frontier moves daily, and the best new AI tooling rarely lands on a press release — it drops in a tweet. This catalog watches X for the repos developers are genuinely shipping and sharing, then filters to the ones with traction (10+ stars) and sorts the signal from the hype.

Every repo is auto-classified into a real taxonomy: **19 domains** from Video, Audio, and Code to Robotics, Security, Finance, and Science — sliced further into focused subdomains like *CLI Coding Agent*, *RAG*, *Voice Cloning*, *Gaussian Splatting*, and *Inference Server*. Each entry is also tagged by **type** — agent framework, MCP server, library, model weights, skill pack, paper code, and more — so you can jump straight to the shape of thing you need.

No endless scrolling, no SEO sludge. Whether you're hunting an agent framework, a self-hostable inference stack, the latest diffusion tooling, or just want to see what's heating up this week, you'll find it here faster than anywhere else.

Bookmark it. The frontier won't wait, and neither does this list.
